title: Compliance: Rust stack.rs replay protection
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.4. File: rust/lichen-node/src/stack.rs. Status: VIOLATION. Lines 121-135 default epoch to 0 instead of random [128,255]. Has set_epoch() at line 174 but requires caller to invoke. Spec requires automatic init on reboot to [128,255] without persistence.
